name: sven-copilot
description: Sven AI assistant as a GitHub Copilot Chat participant. Sven helps code himself, provides codebase awareness, and tests self-healing.

chatParticipants.name: sven
chatParticipants.description: Sven AI assistant — knows his own codebase and can help code himself.

commands.name: soul
commands.description: Show Sven's current active soul content.

commands.name: heal
commands.description: Run self-healing diagnostics — scan for type errors, lint issues, and propose fixes.

commands.name: codebase
commands.description: Provide context about Sven's own codebase to help with coding tasks.

commands.name: deploy
commands.description: Show deployment status and guide through deploying changes.

commands.name: improve
commands.description: Sven analyzes his own code and proposes improvements using GPU inference.

sven.gatewayUrl.description: The Sven gateway API base URL.

sven.extensionApiKey.description: API key for the Sven VS Code extension (SVEN_EXTENSION_API_KEY env var on gateway).
